note_text: Wound note - Rightlowerex. Meas 3.0x1.8x0.2cm. Mod serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 51% gran, 49% slough. Periwound intact. Alginate dsg applied. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Patel notified.
